description_long: This is a medium-sized, two-seater sofa upholstered in smooth brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features a gently curved, padded backrest and armrests that are integrated into the overall form, providing a plush and inviting appearance. The seat consists of a single, wide cushion with subtle horizontal creasing, suggesting comfort and softness. The armrests are broad and rounded, extending slightly outward from the seat, and the backrest is divided into two sections with a faint seam at the center. The base of the sofa is solid and low to the ground, with short, barely visible legs that give it a grounded, stable look. The overall design is modern and understated, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A modern, brown two-seater sofa with smooth leather upholstery, broad rounded armrests, and a single wide seat cushion. The design is plush, inviting, and low to the ground.
description_view_0: Front view shows the two-section backrest, single wide seat cushion, and broad, rounded armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, padded armrest and the gentle curve of the backrest, as well as the sofa's low profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, smooth backrest and the solid, unadorned base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the left, showing the same thick armrest and seat depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: One wide, attached seat cushion and a two-section, attached backrest cushion; both are uniform in size and integrated into the sofa frame.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rounded, and padded armrests that are integrated into the sofa's sides, rising slightly above the seat level with a smooth, continuous profile.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs that are mostly recessed and barely visible, likely made of wood or plastic, positioned at the corners for stability.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, gently curved, continuous backrest with a subtle central seam dividing it into two sections; padded and attached.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid brown color with a smooth, slightly creased leather texture and minimal visible stitching; no decorative patterns or tufting.
